zh.Sayn, Bendorf, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz,: 德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 麥延-可布倫本多福賽

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mechtild von Sayn於大約1150年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 麥延-可布倫本多福賽時，她的父親Eberhard I. von Sayn14歲，母親Kunigunde von Isenburg27歲。她和Heinrich II. von Arenberg至少有2個兒子。她去世於1187年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mechtild von Sayn于大约1150年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 麥延-可布倫本多福賽时，她的父亲Eberhard I. von Sayn14岁，母亲Kunigunde von Isenburg27岁。她和Heinrich II. von Arenberg至少有2个儿子。她去世于1187年之后。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sayn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name based on an unexplained stem san.

nameMeanings.name: Mechtild
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mechtild von Sayn was born about 1150, in Sayn, Bendorf, Mayen-Koblenz, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, her father, Eberhard I. von Sayn, was 14 and her mother, Kunigunde von Isenburg, was 27. She had at least 2 sons with Heinrich II. von Arenberg. She died after 1187.

У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Heinrich II. von Arenberg. Она умерла после 1187 г.
